pages.rationale: The full page has coherent margins, separated line groups, an intact table grid, and no visible clipping, overlap, or missing-page condition.

findings.rationale: The entire page is uniformly empty and contains no discernible document content.

pages.rationale: Whole-page blankness is visible across the complete page area.

findings.rationale: A horizontal content stroke begins inside the page and continues through the right boundary, where it is visibly clipped.

pages.rationale: The rest of the layout is coherent, but the right-edge clipping is an explicit hard visual defect.

findings.rationale: Multiple parallel horizontal strokes are compressed into and obscured by a dense central band, showing severe overprint and loss of readable separation.

pages.rationale: The central content band contains unmistakable overprinting rather than normally separated lines.
